title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Curriculum Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
